subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-02-23
subcodes.first_line: We had a person by the name of Estad Esmail. Indeed, he was peerless.... It is the duty of all the friends to help the families of the martyrs.... Indeed, Mullah Bahram is a blessed being.... Unless the souls are believers in God and assured in the verses of God, wealth causes the hearts to be hardened and without light.
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @martyrs and martyrdom, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
